item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 90 pts (0.455) Buffalo Sabres – 88 pts (0.438) Tampa Bay Lightning – 84 pts (0.431) Pittsburgh Penguins – 83 pts (0.413) Montreal Canadiens – 82 pts (0.414) Detroit Red Wings – 82 pts (0.402) Boston Bruins – 81 pts (0.403) New York Islanders – 81 pts (0.403) Columbus Blue Jackets – 79 pts (0.399) Ottawa Senators – 77 pts (0.389) Philadelphia Flyers – 74 pts (0.374) Washington Capitals – 74 pts (0.363) New Jersey Devils – 70 pts (0.348) Toronto Maple Leafs – 70 pts (0.343) Florida Panthers – 69 pts (0.348) New York Rangers – 64 pts (0.318) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
